Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Now that we've learned how to employ our weapons, let's see how to launch and recover helicopters from your ship's Flight Deck.

USS Gallery carries two SH-2F anti-submarine and reconnaissance helicopters in the hangar aft. Her helicopters are a force multiplier and serve as her main anti-submarine warfare (ASW) armament, and they also carry a surface search radar which is automatically datalinked back to the ship.

Open the Flight Deck by either right clicking on the ship and selecting the Flight Deck menu option, or clicking the small airplane icon on the bottom right. Use the left mouse button to click and drag to move windows around once opened.
